90days.description: 90-day developer pipeline dashboard with account coverage, meeting conversion, assessment velocity, signed-developer progress, asset pipeline, approvals

12months.description: 12-month developer pipeline dashboard with 500 account coverage, meeting conversion, assessment velocity, signed-developer progress, asset pipeline, approvals, launch forecast

90days.description: 90-day investor launch dashboard focused on early traffic, waitlist demand, KYC intent, KYC completion, weekly pacing, and launch-readiness gaps

12months.description: 12-month investor growth dashboard with KPI cards, target ranges, cumulative progress, forecast-to-target, gap analysis, and executive commentary

prKPIs.description: PR dashboard with media coverage, authority-building, inbound-demand, and competitive visibility views

seoContentKPIs.description: SEO/content dashboard connecting content inventory, traffic, engagement, assisted conversion, and funnel contribution

trustComplianceKPIs.description: Trust/compliance dashboard with threshold-based alerts, exception logging, owner assignment, and audit-friendly calculation notes

investorFunnel.description: Full investor conversion funnel tracking from awareness to repeat investment

developerFunnel.description: Full developer conversion funnel tracking from target-account engagement through repeat offering

shareOfVoice.description: Competitive visibility tracker with controlled channel/scenario taxonomy, competitor list, share-of-voice formula, and recurring insight summary

PR.description: Media coverage, press releases, earned media

Social.description: Social media mentions, engagement, brand conversations

Content.description: Thought leadership, blogs, guides, educational content

documentTracking.description: Document engagement tracking with classified offering and education documents, reporting investor consideration activity by category and segment

subscriptionTracking.description: Funded-subscription fact tracking that reconciles subscription starts to completed funding and failed-payment outcomes

weeklyReview.description: Standardized weekly review template with KPI sections, RAG status, variance notes, blockers, decisions, and action-owner tracking

sections.name: Developer KPIs - 90 Day
highlights: Pipeline ahead on meetings and assessments
Signed developers pacing at 2/2 — on track for 3 by end of 90 days
Asset submissions at 6 vs target of 5 — above target
blockers: Target account outreach slowing — need refreshed list
decisions: Approve 2 new target account segments for outreach
Escalate approval workflow capacity to Operations Lead

sections.name: Developer KPIs - 12 Month
highlights: All metrics except assets-approved tracking below linear pace
blockers: Account coverage rate insufficient for annual target
Developer sign conversion rate needs improvement

sections.name: Investor KPIs - 90 Day
highlights: Visitors at 45k vs 45k target — on track
Waitlist signups at 6.2k vs 6k target — exceeding
KYC start rate (18%) and completion rate (62%) both on track
decisions: Shift 20% of awareness budget to conversion campaigns

sections.name: Investor KPIs - 12 Month
highlights: Visitors and waitlist exceeding linear pace
Funded subscriptions at 380 vs 500 target — behind but accelerating
Repeat rate at 18% vs 20% target — slightly behind
blockers: Repeat investment incentive program not yet launched
decisions: Launch repeat investment incentive program in W28

sections.name: PR KPIs
highlights: All tier-1 media, backlinks, interviews, SOV metrics exceeding targets
Share of voice at 32% vs 30% target — gaining ground on competitors
blockers: Event invitation pipeline light for Q3 — need more speaking proposals
decisions: Submit 5 conference speaking proposals by end of W28

sections.name: SEO / Content KPIs
highlights: Keyword rankings at 112 top-10 vs 100 target
decisions: Publish 3 new educational guides next month

sections.name: Trust / Compliance KPIs
highlights: Most compliance metrics green — turnaround, KYC rejections, support response
Partner due diligence overdue items at 5 vs 3 target — red
blockers: Partner due diligence backlog — resource constraint
decisions: Assign dedicated resource to clear partner due diligence backlog
Regulatory checks: extend deadline by 2 weeks

actionItems.description: Double monthly outreach capacity for developer accounts

kpiDictionary.description: Operational KPI dictionary documenting business question, formula, numerator, denominator, grain, event trigger, source of truth, owner, refresh cadence, target range, threshold status, exclusions, and reporting caveats for every metric

entries.notes: Only accounts in approved target segments
Numerator: unique investors who start KYC
Tier-1 defined in media tier taxonomy
Competitor set includes PRYPCO, Stake, SmartCrowd, Deed

investor.description: Investor funnel KPI instrumentation with event specifications, trigger rules, required properties, and validation steps

events.validation: All UTM fields required; page_type must match taxonomy
Must have prior waitlist_signup for same investor_id
Must have kyc_started for same session_id
offering_id must exist in offerings dimension

events.trigger: CTA button clicked on offering page

events.validation: Must have offering_page_viewed for same offering_id
Must have subscription_started for same subscription_id
Must have subscription_completed for same subscription_id
Must have funding_initiated for same transaction_id
Investor must have at least 1 prior funded subscription

developer.description: Developer funnel KPI instrumentation with event specifications for target-account engagement through repeat offering

events.validation: Must have assessment_passed for same developer_id
Must have asset_submitted for same asset_id
Must have asset_approved for at least 1 asset
